## Which tool?

URL of the affected tool, e.g. `https://100tools.site/tools/json-formatter`

## What did you expect to happen?

A clear, one-sentence description.

## What actually happened?

What you saw instead. Screenshots welcome.

1.
2.
3.

```
your sample here
```
